name: 2 运动学（直线/抛体）
subject: physics
domain_name: AS · 物理量与力学 Physical Quantities & Mechanics (Topics 1-6)
curriculum_points: 1 define and use the terms displacement, amplitude, phase difference, period, frequency, wavelength and speed
4 derive, using the definitions of speed, frequency and wavelength, the wave equation v = f λ
5 recall and use v = f λ
6 understand that energy is transferred by a progressive wave

excerpts.text: 1 define and use the terms displacement, amplitude, phase difference, period, frequency, wavelength and speed
4 derive, using the definitions of speed, frequency and wavelength, the wave equation v = f λ
5 recall and use v = f λ
6 understand that energy is transferred by a progressive wave

interactive_resources.description: PhET 运动人：位置/速度/加速度关系（中文版）
Desmos 匀变速直线运动公式交互
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「2 运动学（直线/抛体）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：1 define and use the terms displacement, amplitude, phase difference, period, frequency, wavelength and speed…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：4 derive, using the definitions of speed, frequency and wavelength, the wave equ… 对理解「2 运动学（直线/抛体）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
